name: Didivs'ka Iushka (Grandfather Soup)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cube the peeled potatoes into 1/2-inch pieces.
2. Julienne the carrot and chop the onion.
3. Bring the water to a slow boil. Add the potatoes, carrot, salt, and cook for 6 minutes.
4. Mix the flour with 1 tablespoon of butter until it forms a stiff dough. Pinch off pieces of the dough and roll them into 1/2-inch balls. Drop the dough balls into the simmering soup.
5. Saute the onion in the remaining butter until they start to brown. Add the milk and onions, then cook for an additional 5 minutes.
